---
title: "SEM PhD Course"
description: "A PhD-level course on structural equation models"
date: 2026-04-07
Method: [teaching; slides; code]
categories: [SEM; stat]
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=https://feracotommaso.github.io/SEM-phd-course/">
---
